### Issue #1: [CLUSTER] Extract Messaging Patterns Series

**Status:** âś… Ready to create  
**Template:** Template 6 (Priority Cluster)  
**Priority:** **HIGH** (Chad's most active 2024-2025 series)  
**Estimated Effort:** 5-6 hours  
**Dependencies:** None (standalone)

```markdown
**Title:** [CLUSTER] Extract Messaging Patterns presentation series

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `content:engagementPresentations`, `priority:high`, `cluster`

**Body:**

This is Chad's MOST ACTIVE presentation series (5 repos, 2024-2025 circuit).
Extract entire series with event mapping.

**Base Presentation (same core content, multiple deliveries):**
- https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/UnlockThePowerOfMessagingPatterns-private (**PRIVATE, source of truth**)
- https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/UnlockThePowerOfMessagingPatterns (public variant)
- https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/SuperchargeYourArchitecturesWithMessagingPatterns (related variant)
- https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/MessagingPatternsToTransformYourCloudArchitecture (related variant)

**Event Deliveries (known):**
- Beer City Code 2025
- CodeMash (recent year)
- DevUp 2024
- DevUp 2025
- (Research additional deliveries from repos)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Determine if 4-5 repos represent 1, 2, or 3 unique presentations
- [ ] Create base presentation(s) from private repo (authoritative source)
- [ ] Create event entries for each conference
- [ ] Create engagementPresentations linking presentations to events
- [ ] Extract event-specific content/demos/slides from each repo
- [ ] Tag comprehensively: `messaging`, `architecture`, `cloud`, `Azure`, `patterns`, `microservices`, `event-driven`
- [ ] Cross-link related presentations if multiple base presentations exist
- [ ] Verify delivery dates from CFP/schedule data

**Resources:**
- Private (authoritative): https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/UnlockThePowerOfMessagingPatterns-private
- Public variants: See repos above
- Event research: Check conference websites for exact dates

**Dependencies:**
- None (first extraction priority)

**Estimated Effort:** 5-6 hours (complex: multiple repos, event research, variant analysis)

**Notes:**
- This is Chad's flagship series; prioritize accuracy over speed
- Check if variants are truly different presentations or same content with different titles
- Private repo has most complete content; use as canonical source
```

- BuildingServerlessSolutions-NDCOslo â†’ NDC Oslo, 2023 (verify date)

- BuildingServerlessSolutions-Refactor2024 â†’ Refactor, May 2024 (verify)
- (Research: any other deliveries)

  - `src/content/events/ndc-oslo-2023.md`
